scenarios.description: NOAA severe icing on I-80; alternate I-70 is clear and bridge-compliant
Flash flood on I-55 southbound; I-57 alternate is clear and compliant
High wind advisory on mountain pass; low-altitude alternate is compliant
Severity-4 pileup on I-90; alternate US-20 is clear, all bridges compliant
Multi-vehicle accident on I-35; I-135 alternate is compliant
Heavy haul (45t) exceeds bridge load limit (35t) on proposed alternate
